best_config.note: best_config shows the DESLOC K-configuration achieving the lowest final training loss for each model size across all benchmark runs

throughput_comparison.note: throughput_comparison reports peak tokens/second for each method. desloc_vs_ddp_throughput_ratio > 1 means DESLOC is faster than DDP baseline.

comm_reduction.note: comm_reduction measures the fraction of communication rounds eliminated vs full sync. overall_weighted_comm_reduction is weighted by total training steps across all runs.

loss_trajectories.note: loss_trajectories groups training loss curves by (model_size, method, K-config). Losses are subsampled to ≤100 points using the longest representative run per group.
